title: Surgeon Vacancy at Abbott India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Abbott India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Abbott India Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Surgeon based out of Ahmedabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Abbott India Holdings Services:
Abbott India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Abbott India Holdings Services!
